data.name: 911Dispatch Optimizer
data.description: Optimizes 911 dispatch operations by prioritizing calls based on severity, location proximity, and available units, reducing response times through intelligent unit assignment and real-time rerouting capabilities.
data.readme:
## 911Dispatch Optimizer

Optimizes 911 dispatch operations by prioritizing calls based on severity, location proximity, and available units, reducing response times through intelligent unit assignment and real-time rerouting capabilities.

### Framework: LlamaIndex

### Tools
["Call Prioritizer","Unit Assigner","Route Optimizer"]

### Tags
["911","dispatch","response-time","prioritization"]
data.author: Public SafetyAI Labs
